purpose: Load, select, configure, and execute sub-agents and sidekicks — from YAML definitions through triggered background execution and fleet coordination, delivering results back to the main session

activities.name: Load Agent Definitions
activities.description: Parse definitions/*.agent.yaml files including code-review, explore, research, rubber-duck, task, rem-agent; extract tools, model, system prompt, and description fields

activities.name: Load Sidekick Definitions
activities.description: Parse definitions/sidekick/*.yaml (github-context, subconscious); configure triggers (e.g., user.message event), launch conditions, and background execution parameters

activities.name: Select Agent for Request
activities.description: Match user intent to agent via description/inference or explicit /agent select command; resolve to specific agent definition for session creation

activities.name: Configure Agent Session
activities.description: Apply agent-specific tools restriction, model override, system prompt injection, MCP server bindings; create isolated sub-session with parent context

activities.name: Execute Sidekick on Trigger
activities.description: On user.message event, launch sidekick agents (github-context, subconscious) in background; cancel running sidekicks on new turn to prevent stale context

activities.name: Coordinate Fleet Mode
activities.description: When session.fleet.start() called, orchestrate parallel agent execution across multiple sub-sessions with shared workspace access

activities.name: Collect Sub-agent Results
activities.description: Gather subagent.completed/subagent.failed events from sub-sessions; relay results to main session via send_inbox tool; merge findings into parent context

arrows.label: Tool system (provides restricted tool set for agent)
Sidekick trigger conditions and launch config
Multiple configured sub-sessions for parallel execution
Sub-agent results relayed via send_inbox tool to main session
subagent.completed / subagent.failed events to SDK client
